languages.text: Механизмы работают исправно, несмотря на пылающий прометий вокруг.

traits.locale_text: Механизмы работают исправно, несмотря на пылающий прометий вокруг.

languages.text: The mechanisms are in working order, despite the burning promethium all around them.
languages.original_text: Механизмы работают исправно, несмотря на пылающий прометий вокруг.

traits.locale_text: The mechanisms are in working order, despite the burning promethium all around them.
The mechanisms are in working order, despite the burning promethium all around them.
The mechanisms are in working order, despite the burning promethium all around them.

languages.text: 尽管周围满是燃烧的钷素，这些机械仍在正常运转。
languages.original_text: The mechanisms are in working order, despite the burning promethium all around them.

traits.locale_text: 尽管周围满是燃烧的钷素，这些机械仍在正常运转。

languages.text: Los mecanismos funcionan, a pesar del prometio que arde a su alrededor.
languages.original_text: The mechanisms are in working order, despite the burning promethium all around them.

traits.locale_text: Los mecanismos funcionan, a pesar del prometio que arde a su alrededor.

languages.text: En dépit du prométhium incandescent, les mécanismes fonctionnent correctement.
languages.original_text: The mechanisms are in working order, despite the burning promethium all around them.

traits.locale_text: En dépit du prométhium incandescent, les mécanismes fonctionnent correctement.

languages.text: Etraftaki yanan prometyuma rağmen mekanizmalar çalışır durumda.
languages.original_text: The mechanisms are in working order, despite the burning promethium all around them.

traits.locale_text: Etraftaki yanan prometyuma rağmen mekanizmalar çalışır durumda.

languages.text: Obwohl sie von brennendem Promethium umgeben sind, funktionieren die Mechanismen.
languages.original_text: The mechanisms are in working order, despite the burning promethium all around them.

traits.locale_text: Obwohl sie von brennendem Promethium umgeben sind, funktionieren die Mechanismen.

languages.text: プロメシウムが燃え盛る中、そのメカニズムは稼働している。
languages.original_text: The mechanisms are in working order, despite the burning promethium all around them.

traits.locale_text: プロメシウムが燃え盛る中、そのメカニズムは稼働している。
